description_long: This is a stylized, stone fountain with a two-tiered design, featuring a central elevated bowl supported by a square pedestal. The lower basin is octagonal and filled with water, bordered by thick stone walls adorned with geometric patterns and decorative engravings. Four large stone spheres are symmetrically placed on square plinths at the corners of the basin, adding a classical ornamental touch. The fountain's stonework is rendered in warm brown hues, with subtle texturing to suggest weathered masonry. The water in the basin is a clear blue, contrasting with the earthy tones of the stone. The overall structure is compact and robust, suitable for placement in plazas, parks, or courtyards.
description: A compact, two-tiered stone fountain with an octagonal basin, central bowl, and four decorative stone spheres, featuring engraved patterns and filled with blue water.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central bowl, all four stone spheres, and the engraved octagonal basin filled with water.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the right side of the fountain, with clear visibility of the geometric engravings and water surface.
description_view_2: Rear-left angle showing the back of the central pedestal and the arrangement of the stone spheres around the basin.
description_view_3: Left-side view emphasizing the symmetry of the stone spheres and the detailed stonework on the basin's rim.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features geometric engravings on the pedestal and basin walls, as well as four large, smooth stone spheres on plinths at each corner, lending a classical and decorative appearance.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is octagonal, moderately deep, and bordered by thick stone walls with a raised rim. It is divided into a lower water-filled section and an upper tier supporting the central bowl.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or sprays; the water appears still and pooled within the basin.
